functions.name: has_ic
functions.docstring: Return True if the ic (Intercore) CLI is on PATH.

functions.name: has_bd
functions.docstring: Return True if the bd (Beads) CLI is on PATH.

functions.name: has_companion
functions.docstring: Return True if the named plugin is in the Claude Code cache.

functions.name: in_ecosystem
functions.docstring: Return True if the centralized interbase install exists.

functions.name: get_bead
functions.docstring: Return the current bead ID from $CLAVAIN_BEAD_ID, or empty string.

functions.name: in_sprint
functions.docstring: Return True if there is an active sprint context (bead + ic run).
